This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/19df7bad-6e70-4ec4-a4cd-0af0aff4b3dc?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/3e243a74-ae86-4a56-b031-155296c34177?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/b383689b-2106-47f6-bbd7-a58bc45908cc?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/272cc3b1-1148-4d22-8778-b854db53821a?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. 95% of content is free, but for the remaining 5% you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/9d78417f-3c8b-489d-9a4d-9e4812988243?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. Also:
1: LessOnline [ https://substack.com/redirect/59bab4de-5ede-43bf-93cf-a068a02b9e7e?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], an annual gathering of the online rationalist community, is happening again this year, May 30 - June 1 in Berkeley, $450 for tickets. If you can’t make the main event, there will probably be an adjacent (free) ACX meetup, exact time to be announced. 
2: My father has written and self-published a book [ https://substack.com/redirect/52eb924e-b88a-4444-ba0d-510f6f0784c0?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] about his life and experiences on medical missions:
It purports to be a “memoir” but struggles to resist turning into a lecture on lots of interesting facts about medicine - which is also what living with my father is like, so good job memoiring, I guess. Whoever chooses this for the next book review contest will win automatically (not really).
